title: Indodax - Rekt
relevance_summary: Multi-chain withdrawal with compromised hot wallets

prevention.rule: Block any tx that initiates a withdrawal from a known compromised wallet address.

red_flags: Multiple suspicious transactions involving known compromised wallets
Legitimate-looking withdrawals with change addresses depositing back into the exchange
summary: Indodax suffered a multi-chain withdrawal exploit where hackers used compromised hot wallets to siphon off millions of dollars worth of assets. A guard could have blocked withdrawals from known compromised wallet addresses to prevent such losses.
